The '''Battle of Shaylin 18''' was a crucial battle between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that took place at [[Shaylin 18]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="AIR" /> The victorious rebel forces<ref name="TEA" /> were commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]]. Due to his performance, he would later be assigned the command of [[Delta Base]] and of [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]].<ref name="AIR" />
